text:
Narumi McGait (マクガイトナルミ, Makugaito Narumi) is a woman whose Nen ability was at one point stolen by Chrollo Lucilfer. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 406 

Not much is known about her except that she is a Nen user. At some point, Chrollo Lucilfer was able to steal her Nen ability and uses it during his time on the Black Whale to try and locate someone with an ability that will allow him to defeat Hisoka. 

Appearance

Narumi's only appearance in the manga so far is her portrait on a page in Chrollo's Skill Hunter. She has large eyes, black neck-length hair framing a square-shaped face, and a slight fringe covering her eyebrows. Her portrait shows her wearing a simple, light-colored sleeveless top. 

Personality

Not much is known about Narumi as she has only been seen as a picture and not in person. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

On the twelfth day of the voyage, Chrollo uses Love Dial 6700, stolen from Narumi, twice in different locations around the crowd gathering for 9 th Prince Halkenburg's funeral procession, but is unable to locate the person he seeks both times and concludes that the person he seeks is on the upper tiers of the Black Whale. 

Abilities & Powers

Narumi is a Nen user, as a picture of her with her ability is seen on a page in Chrollo's Skill Hunter. 

Nen

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Love Dial 6700 's Japanese name () likely references two songs:
Love Dial 6700 is likely a reference to a song of the same name by Japanese pop group Finger 5.
Disgusting Telephone (いまわしでんわ), is likely to be read as いまわし, the name of a song by P-Model.
